summary: Comprehensive testing of Talentos Financial Management System completed. Backend APIs working excellently (96.2% success rate). Frontend authentication, dashboard, and navigation functional with one modal overlay issue in company creation.

minor_bugs.issue: Inventory validation returning unexpected status code
minor_bugs.impact: Stock validation test failed - should return 400 for insufficient stock

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepting button clicks in company creation dialog
ui_bugs.workaround: Force click bypasses overlay but indicates z-index/modal layering issue

integration_issues.issue: Navigation buttons correctly disabled until company creation, but modal submit has overlay interference

passed_tests: Sales CRUD operations with inventory tracking
Bills CRUD operations with payment status
Navigation state management (disabled until company created)
Logout functionality returning to login page
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay z-index issue in company creation dialog - the DialogOverlay component is intercepting button clicks. Consider adjusting CSS z-index or modal click handling to ensure submit button is clickable without force=True.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (Authentication, dashboard, navigation work. Company creation has modal overlay issue)
